query:
UPDATE professors SET research_field_zh = CASE research_field
  WHEN 'Arts & Humanities' THEN '艺术与人文'
  WHEN 'Biology' THEN '生物学'
  WHEN 'Chemistry' THEN '化学'
  WHEN 'Computer Science' THEN '计算机科学'
  WHEN 'Data Science' THEN '数据科学'
  WHEN 'Economics' THEN '经济学'
  WHEN 'Education' THEN '教育学'
  WHEN 'Engineering' THEN '工程学'
  WHEN 'Environmental Science' THEN '环境科学'
  WHEN 'Law' THEN '法学'
  WHEN 'Mathematics' THEN '数学'
  WHEN 'Medicine' THEN '医学'
  WHEN 'Neuroscience' THEN '神经科学'
  WHEN 'Physics' THEN '物理学'
  WHEN 'Political Science' THEN '政治学'
  WHEN 'Psychology' THEN '心理学'
  WHEN 'Public Health' THEN '公共卫生'
  WHEN 'Social Sciences' THEN '社会科学'
  WHEN 'Materials Science' THEN '材料科学'
  WHEN 'Business' THEN '商学'
  WHEN 'Linguistics' THEN '语言学'
  WHEN 'Philosophy' THEN '哲学'
  WHEN 'Sociology' THEN '社会学'
  WHEN 'Anthropology' THEN '人类学'
  WHEN 'History' THEN '历史学'
  WHEN 'Information Science' THEN '信息科学'
  WHEN 'Statistics' THEN '统计学'
  WHEN 'Biomedical Engineering' THEN '生物医学工程'
  WHEN 'Electrical Engineering' THEN '电气工程'
  WHEN 'Mechanical Engineering' THEN '机械工程'
  WHEN 'Civil Engineering' THEN '土木工程'
  WHEN 'Chemical Engineering' THEN '化学工程'
  WHEN 'Aerospace Engineering' THEN '航空航天工程'
  WHEN 'Architecture' THEN '建筑学'
  WHEN 'Urban Planning' THEN '城市规划'
  WHEN 'Music' THEN '音乐'
  WHEN 'Art' THEN '艺术'
  WHEN 'Film & Media' THEN '电影与媒体'
  WHEN 'Communications' THEN '传播学'
  WHEN 'Journalism' THEN '新闻学'
  WHEN 'International Relations' THEN '国际关系'
  WHEN 'Public Policy' THEN '公共政策'
  WHEN 'Finance' THEN '金融学'
  WHEN 'Marketing' THEN '市场营销'
  WHEN 'Management' THEN '管理学'
  WHEN 'Accounting' THEN '会计学'
  WHEN 'Operations Research' THEN '运筹学'
  WHEN 'Cognitive Science' THEN '认知科学'
  WHEN 'Genetics' THEN '遗传学'
  WHEN 'Biochemistry' THEN '生物化学'
  WHEN 'Astronomy' THEN '天文学'
  WHEN 'Geoscience' THEN '地球科学'
  WHEN 'Oceanography' THEN '海洋学'
  WHEN 'Ecology' THEN '生态学'
  WHEN 'Immunology' THEN '免疫学'
  WHEN 'Pharmacology' THEN '药理学'
  WHEN 'Nursing' THEN '护理学'
  WHEN 'Dentistry' THEN '牙科学'
  WHEN 'Veterinary Science' THEN '兽医学'
  WHEN 'Agriculture' THEN '农业科学'
  WHEN 'Food Science' THEN '食品科学'
  ELSE research_field
END
WHERE research_field IS NOT NULL AND research_field != ''
